app.title: AI Meeting Assistant
app.pageTitle: AI Meeting Assistant - Real-time Transcription & AI Summary

empty.summaryDesc: Create a summary from the current conversation
empty.consultDesc: Ask AI for advice about the meeting content
empty.minutesDesc: Output formatted meeting minutes. Available after stopping recording.

meeting.resumeHint: Press the Pause/Resume button to resume

transcript.placeholder: Transcription will appear here when recording starts...
transcript.truncatedNotice: {{count}} earlier segments not shown (available in export)

aiResponse.placeholder: AI responses will appear here when you ask a question...

browser.incompatibleMessage: Some features are not supported in your browser. Please use the latest version of Chrome, Edge, or Safari.
browser.incompatibleTooltip: The following features are not available: {features}

error.fatalBody: An unexpected error occurred. Recording has been stopped automatically if in progress.

config.title: Settings
config.closeTabHint: Could not close automatically due to browser restrictions. Please close this tab manually.

security.title: API Key Security
security.description: API keys are session-only by default and are cleared when the tab/browser closes. Installed app mode can optionally remember keys. They are never sent to external servers.
security.encrypted: Default: session-only storage (installed app mode can optionally persist)
security.httpsOnly: Only sent via HTTPS during API calls
security.clientWarningText: This app calls APIs directly from your browser. Avoid using on shared or public computers. Enable device lock and user separation.

storage.persistLabel: API keys are session-only (cannot be persisted in browser mode)
storage.persistWarning: Keys are cleared when the tab/browser closes. Export does not include API keys.
storage.persistLabelEnabled: Remember API keys in this app (not recommended)
storage.persistWarningEnabled: API keys are stored unencrypted in localStorage on this device. Keep this OFF on shared devices. Keys may be exposed if the device is lost or stolen. Export does not include API keys.

stt.title: Transcription (STT) - Provider Selection
stt.providerHint: Select an STT provider. WebSocket-based providers offer better real-time performance.
stt.getFromDeepgram: Get from Deepgram Console - WebSocket realtime
stt.infoOpenAI: OpenAI Whisper: Stability-focused. Pseudo-realtime via chunked upload
stt.infoWebSocket: Deepgram: True realtime via WebSocket. Low latency
stt.providerNotes:
💡 About STT Providers
• OpenAI Whisper: Stable, pseudo-real-time via chunked uploads
• Deepgram: True real-time via WebSocket, low latency
stt.userDictHint: Enter proper nouns to improve recognition, separated by commas.
stt.userDictHintDetail: Adding phonetic readings improves accuracy (e.g., Anthropic anthropic)

llm.title: AI Response & Summary (Optional) - Select LLM
llm.priorityHint: Auto-select order: Claude → OpenAI → Gemini → Groq (uses first available)
llm.notConfiguredWarning: If no LLM API key is set, AI features like summary, opinion, and minutes will not be available. Please configure at least one above.
llm.getFromGemini: Get from Google AI Studio (for summary/AI responses)
llm.getFromOpenAILLM: Get from OpenAI Platform (separate key from STT recommended)
llm.getFromGroq: Get from Groq Console (fast, low cost)
llm.customModelWarning: ⚠️ Custom model: Not verified, may not work due to API changes

options.title: Options
options.clearOnClose: Auto-delete API keys when browser closes (for shared PCs)
options.persistMeetingContext: Persist meeting context across sessions (not recommended)
options.persistMeetingContextHint: Not recommended on shared devices. Meeting context remains in this browser.
options.maxRecordingMinutesHint: Recording stops automatically after this duration to prevent leaving transcription running. Set 0 for unlimited.
options.enhancedContextEnabled: Enable file attachments for meeting context
options.enhancedContextHint: When enabled, you can attach TXT/MD/PDF/DOCX/CSV files to provide additional meeting materials to AI.

backup.title: Settings Backup
backup.hint: Export files are password-protected. Can be used for migrating to other devices.

messages.saved: Settings saved. Return to the main screen to start using the app.
messages.migrated: Old settings migrated. STT provider set to OpenAI Whisper.
messages.exported: Settings exported. API keys are not included.
messages.importOldFormat: Old export format (v2) is no longer supported. Please re-export using v3.
messages.importFailed: Import failed. Please check the file format.
messages.invalidApiKey: API key is invalid. Please enter a correct key.

prompts.clearConfirm: Delete all settings including API keys? This cannot be undone.

recording.interrupted: Recording interrupted. Content saved. Press the Pause/Resume button to continue

structuring.saved: Saved the organized conversation to history
structuring.failed: The conversation could not be organized. The original transcript remains saved.
structuring.saveFailed: The organized content could not be saved. The original transcript was not changed.

llm.notConfigured: LLM API key not set. Please register an API key in settings.

model.fallbackRetry: Error with selected model. Retrying with {fallback} (settings unchanged)

qa.duplicate: Same question was recently sent. Please wait before trying again.
qa.minutesAfterStop: Minutes can only be generated after stopping the recording

transcript.noText: No transcription available (may only contain excluded segments)

api.notConfigured:
LLM API key not configured.
Please enter an API key in settings.

prompt.tooLong: Input too long ({current} chars). Please limit to {max} chars.

prompt.summary: Please summarize the following meeting content concisely. List the key points in bullet points.
prompt.opinion: Please provide your AI opinion and analysis on the following meeting content. Point out any improvements or concerns.
prompt.idea: Based on the following meeting content, please suggest 3 new ideas or proposals.
prompt.consult:
You are a thoughtful advisor participating in this meeting.
Please read the transcript below and respond from two perspectives:

[Opinions & Feedback]
- Organize the main discussion points
- Point out perspectives that might be overlooked
- Provide constructive improvement suggestions

[Ideas & Approaches]
- Ideas to develop the discussion further
- Alternative approaches from different angles
- Creative alternatives

Please respond specifically and concisely.
prompt.minutes:
From the following meeting transcript, please create structured meeting minutes.

Include:
1. **Agenda**: List the main topics discussed
2. **Decisions**: Clearly state any conclusions reached
3. **Action Items**: Who will do what (as far as possible)
4. **Next Steps**: Any upcoming actions or schedules

Format:
- Use ## for headings
- Use bullet points
- **Bold** important content
prompt.structuring:
Organize the conversation using only the transcript below as evidence. Return exactly one JSON object without Markdown or explanatory text.

JSON format:
{
  "title": "concise title",
  "category": "one of 会議・打合せ|相談・確認|指示・依頼|アイデア|その他",
  "tags": ["up to five tags"],
  "keyPoints": ["key point"],
  "decisions": ["decision"],
  "actionCandidates": ["action candidate"],
  "openQuestions": ["open question"]
}

actionCandidates are suggestions for HUMAN review, not confirmed tasks or TODOs. Do not invent owners, deadlines, or decisions. Use an empty array when an item does not apply.
{additionalInstruction}

[Transcript]
{transcript}
prompt.structuringRetry: The previous response was not valid JSON. Follow the JSON format above exactly and return only the JSON object.

structuring.candidateNote: This is an AI proposal. Review and edit it before saving.
structuring.title: Title
structuring.actionCandidates: Action candidates (not confirmed tasks; one per line)
structuring.additionalInstructionPlaceholder: Example: Make the candidates I should handle more specific
structuring.regenerateConfirm: Your current edits will be discarded. Regenerate using the additional instruction?

document.title: Meeting Record
document.aiWorkOrderIntro: Treat this markdown as the primary source and follow the rules below.
document.aiWorkOrderRuleNoGuess: Do not guess. If information is missing, list it explicitly as missing information.
document.aiWorkOrderRuleEvidence: For key decisions, include supporting evidence from this markdown.
document.aiWorkOrderRuleOrder: Keep the output order fixed and do not reorder sections.
document.aiWorkOrderRuleQuestionFirst: Show clarification questions first, then provide deliverables.
document.costDisclaimer: These amounts are estimates. Actual charges may differ.

history.modalDescription: Recordings are saved automatically when stopped and kept on this device until you delete them.
history.empty: No saved meetings yet. Stop a recording to auto-save.
history.noMatches: No history records match these filters.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search title, tags, transcript, and organized content
history.deleteConfirm: Delete this history record? This action cannot be undone.
history.clearConfirm: Delete all saved meetings? This action cannot be undone.
history.restoreConfirmRecording: Recording in progress. Stop recording and load history?
history.restoreConfirmOverwrite: Overwrite current transcript and AI responses?
history.notSupported: History is not available in this browser.
history.backupNoRecords: No history records to back up
history.backupImportNoRecords: No history records found in backup JSON
history.backupImportModePrompt:
Choose restore mode.
OK: Add to existing history
Cancel: Overwrite existing history
history.backupImportOverwriteConfirm: This will delete existing history before restore. Continue?
history.diagnosticDescription: Paste the following into your issue body (no meeting text, audio, or API keys included)
history.importConfirmOverwrite: Overwrite current transcript and AI responses?
history.importNoTranscript: No transcript found in the file

welcome.title: Welcome to AI Meeting Assistant
welcome.description: AI participates in your meetings in real-time, providing transcription, summaries, opinions, and ideas.
welcome.feature3: API keys are session-only and cleared on close
welcome.feature4: Real-time display of estimated usage costs
welcome.terms: By starting, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

llmModal.title: LLM Settings
llmModal.hint: 💡 You can change LLM settings while recording. The new settings will apply from the next AI call.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

context.modalDescription: Adding meeting goals and reference materials helps AI generate more relevant responses.
context.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Finalize requirements for new feature
context.handoffPlaceholder: e.g., Previous decisions, unresolved issues, prerequisites
context.referencePlaceholder: e.g., Topics from previous meeting, links to related documents
context.dropZoneText: Drag files here or click to select
context.dropZoneHint: Supported: TXT, MD, PDF, DOCX, CSV (max 20MB each)
context.reasoningBoostHint: May improve accuracy, but increases time/cost
context.nativeDocsHint: Send PDFs directly - may improve accuracy/increase cost
context.nativeDocsApiGuide: Required API: Gemini API (model examples: gemini-2.5-flash / gemini-2.5-pro / gemini-2.0-flash)
context.nativeDocsDisabled: Only available with Gemini + PDF attached
context.nativeDocsNeedsGeminiKey: Gemini API key (LLM settings) is required
context.nativeDocsNeedsGeminiPriority: Set LLM priority to Gemini (or keep auto so Gemini is selected)
context.nativeDocsNeedsPdf: Attach at least one PDF file to enable this
context.nativeDocsFallback: Native Docs failed, falling back to text extraction

demo.stopRecordingFirst: Stop recording before loading demo data
